article:
100% Chiropractic Newington, led by Dr. Brendan Allen, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care for individuals and families in Newington, Connecticut and the greater Hartford area. Located at 3313 Berlin Turnpike, the practice follows the 100% Chiropractic model of whole-body wellness — focusing not just on symptom relief, but on identifying and correcting the underlying spinal misalignments that contribute to pain, reduced mobility, and diminished health.

Dr. Allen's approach begins with a thorough evaluation including posture analysis and spinal examination. Based on findings, he develops personalized corrective care plans designed to restore proper spinal alignment and improve nervous system function. Patients commonly seek care for back pain, neck pain, headaches, sciatica, and general wellness optimization.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. New patients can expect a welcoming environment focused on education — understanding why proper spinal alignment matters for long-term health, not just short-term pain relief.

Whether you're dealing with chronic pain, recovering from an injury, or looking to maintain optimal health for your family, 100% Chiropractic Newington offers a comprehensive approach to chiropractic wellness in central Connecticut.

Barclay Chiropractic & Wellness is a full-service chiropractic and rehabilitation clinic in Fayetteville, Georgia, led by Dr. Asia Barclay, DC. Located at 1240 Highway 54, the practice offers whole-body care plans tailored to each patient's specific needs.

Dr. Barclay and her team treat a wide range of conditions including chronic pain, sciatica, headaches and migraines, vertigo, disc injuries, scoliosis, and sports-related injuries. The clinic also provides personal injury treatment and sports conditioning services, making it a comprehensive destination for patients with diverse health concerns in the Fayetteville and Fayette County area.

What sets Barclay Chiropractic apart is its rehabilitation focus. Rather than offering adjustments alone, Dr. Barclay integrates rehabilitation exercises and whole-body care plans to address the root cause of pain and dysfunction. This approach helps patients not only find relief but build the strength and stability needed to prevent future problems.

The practice serves patients of all ages, from athletes dealing with sports injuries to office workers suffering from chronic neck and back pain. If you're in the Fayetteville, Peachtree City, or south Atlanta metro area and looking for a chiropractor who takes a comprehensive approach to musculoskeletal health, Barclay Chiropractic & Wellness offers personalized care backed by thorough evaluation and treatment planning.

Zenyth Chiropractic in Temecula, California is led by Dr. Charly Swanberg, DC, along with associate Dr. Ryan. The practice is located at 32909 Temecula Parkway and focuses on family health, corrective care, and overall wellness for the Temecula Valley community.

Dr. Swanberg's philosophy centers on corrective chiropractic care — going beyond temporary pain relief to address the structural issues that cause recurring problems. Through detailed spinal analysis and individualized care plans, the Zenyth team works to restore proper alignment and improve nervous system function for patients of all ages.

The office sees patients Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8:30am to 12pm and 2pm to 5:30pm, and Tuesday from 2pm to 5:30pm. The practice welcomes families, including children and seniors, recognizing that every stage of life benefits from proper spinal health.

For residents of Temecula, Murrieta, and the surrounding Inland Empire communities seeking chiropractic care that focuses on long-term correction rather than just symptom management, Zenyth Chiropractic offers a patient-centered approach to spinal health and family wellness.

address: 2050 St Johns Parkway, Suite 107, St. Johns, FL 32259
article:
100% Chiropractic Saint Johns, led by Dr. Gregory Tonnesen, DC, serves families in the St. Johns, Ponte Vedra, and greater Jacksonville area of northeast Florida. Located at 2050 St Johns Parkway, Suite 107, the practice provides corrective chiropractic care focused on restoring proper spinal alignment and supporting the body's natural ability to heal.

Dr. Tonnesen follows the 100% Chiropractic approach of education-first care. New patients receive comprehensive evaluations to identify spinal misalignments and their impact on overall health. From there, personalized corrective care plans are designed to address the root cause of pain and dysfunction — not just mask symptoms.

The office is open Monday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, Wednesday and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. Common conditions treated include back pain, neck pain, headaches, and general wellness concerns.

St. Johns County is one of Florida's fastest-growing communities, and 100% Chiropractic Saint Johns provides accessible corrective chiropractic care for families moving into the area or those seeking an alternative to medication-based pain management.

Spine By Design Studio in Aurora, Colorado was founded by Dr. Yahdi D. Cotto-Jorge, DC, to bring compassionate, specialized chiropractic care to the Aurora and east Denver metro community. Located at 14151 E Cedar Ave, the practice offers chiropractic services for every stage of life — from pregnancy and pediatric care to everyday wellness and pain relief.

Dr. Cotto uses focused adjustments to relieve back and neck pain, address headaches and migraines, and enhance the body's natural healing abilities. The practice takes a personalized approach, empowering patients with lifestyle advice for long-term health, vitality, and comfort. Whether you're an expectant mother, a growing child, or an adult dealing with chronic pain, the care is tailored to your specific needs.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm. Dr. Cotto is known for gentle, effective adjustments that prioritize patient comfort while delivering results.

For families in Aurora, Centennial, and the surrounding east Denver communities looking for a chiropractor who specializes in pregnancy, pediatric development, and whole-family wellness, Spine By Design Studio offers a warm, patient-focused environment.

100% Chiropractic Davie, led by Dr. Marielis Montalvo Perez, DC, provides comprehensive chiropractic care in Davie, Florida, serving the Davie, Plantation, and Fort Lauderdale communities. Located at 8570 Stirling Road, the practice goes beyond traditional adjustments to offer massage therapy, stretch therapy, and nutritional supplement guidance.

Dr. Montalvo Perez's integrated approach means patients receive care that addresses multiple dimensions of health — spinal alignment, soft tissue recovery, flexibility, and nutritional support. This makes the practice particularly well-suited for patients dealing with chronic conditions, post-injury recovery, or those seeking a proactive approach to wellness.

The office is open Monday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, Wednesday and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. New patients are welcomed with thorough evaluations to identify the care plan that best fits their individual needs.

For residents of Broward County looking for chiropractic care that combines adjustments with therapeutic massage, stretch therapy, and nutritional counseling, 100% Chiropractic Davie offers a comprehensive wellness experience.

100% Chiropractic McDonough, led by Dr. Zachary Anthony, DC, is a community-focused chiropractic practice in McDonough, Georgia. Located at 3512 Highway 155 North, the practice provides corrective chiropractic care for families throughout Henry County and the south Atlanta metro area.

Dr. Anthony is deeply involved in the McDonough community, bringing an approach to chiropractic care that emphasizes education and long-term correction over quick fixes. His practice follows the 100% Chiropractic philosophy of identifying and correcting spinal misalignments that interfere with nervous system function and overall health.

The office is open Monday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, Wednesday and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm. Patients commonly seek care for back pain, neck pain, headaches, and family wellness.

For families in McDonough, Stockbridge, Locust Grove, and the surrounding Henry County communities, 100% Chiropractic McDonough provides accessible corrective chiropractic care in a welcoming, family-friendly environment.

Calhoun Chiropractic, led by Dr. Andre 'Dre' White, DC, brings a next-level approach to chiropractic care in Calhoun, Georgia. Located at 136 W Belmont Drive, the practice serves patients throughout Gordon County and northwest Georgia.

Dr. White's path to chiropractic began with his studies in exercise physiology at Kennesaw State University, followed by his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from Life University. This dual background gives him a unique perspective on the relationship between spinal health, physical fitness, and overall wellness.

The practice treats a wide variety of conditions beyond traditional back pain — including muscle strain, chronic pain, migraines, headaches, and sports injuries. Dr. White's approach combines precise spinal adjustments with patient education, helping people understand how proper alignment supports their body's natural healing capabilities.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 9am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Saturday mornings from 9am to 12pm. The Saturday hours make care accessible for patients who can't visit during the work week.

For residents of Calhoun, Adairsville, Dalton, and the surrounding northwest Georgia area, Calhoun Chiropractic offers comprehensive care from a doctor who combines exercise science expertise with chiropractic knowledge.

100% Chiropractic Troy, led by Dr. Joe Richardson, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care for families in Troy, Michigan and the greater Oakland County area. Located at 3134 Rochester Road, the practice focuses on identifying and correcting spinal misalignments to restore proper nervous system function.

Dr. Richardson's passion for natural healing began with a personal experience — watching his sister recover from a horse-related back injury through chiropractic care. Born and raised in Romeo, Michigan, he brings a genuine, community-oriented approach to his practice.

The office offers extended hours with Monday from 8am to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, Wednesday and Thursday from 8am to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. Dr. Richardson's practice welcomes patients of all ages seeking corrective care, wellness maintenance, or relief from specific conditions.

For families in Troy, Rochester Hills, Sterling Heights, and the greater Oakland County area looking for a chiropractor who combines technical skill with genuine personal investment in patient outcomes, 100% Chiropractic Troy offers corrective chiropractic care in a welcoming setting.

address: 1921 W Imperial Highway, La Habra, CA
article:
100% Chiropractic La Habra, owned and operated by Dr. Mona Panchal, DC, provides comprehensive chiropractic care in La Habra, California. Located at 1921 W Imperial Highway, the practice serves patients throughout north Orange County and the La Habra, Whittier, and Brea communities.

What distinguishes Dr. Panchal's practice is its breadth of coverage. Beyond standard chiropractic wellness care, the office specializes in auto accident treatment, workers' compensation cases, personal injury care, and Medicare patients. This makes it a versatile choice for patients with diverse needs — whether they've been in a car accident, sustained a workplace injury, or are looking for ongoing wellness care.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. Dr. Panchal and her team provide thorough initial evaluations to develop care plans appropriate for each patient's condition and goals.

For residents of La Habra, Whittier, Brea, and the surrounding north Orange County communities, 100% Chiropractic La Habra offers accessible chiropractic care that covers everything from wellness maintenance to injury recovery and insurance-based treatment.

address: 175 E Campus View Boulevard, Columbus, OH
article:
Restore Family Chiropractic in Columbus, Ohio is led by Dr. Todd Marquis, PhD, and Dr. Marisa Marquis. Located at 175 E Campus View Boulevard, the practice operates under the philosophy that 'Pain steals — health restores,' focusing on corrective spinal care to help patients reconnect with their lives.

Dr. Todd Marquis brings a unique perspective to chiropractic wellness. As a retired professor who personally experienced serious health challenges — including three open heart surgeries and advanced heart failure — he was inspired to pursue chiropractic wellness education. This deeply personal journey informs his approach to patient care and his understanding of what it means to reclaim health.

The practice follows MaxLiving principles and offers corrective care, family wellness services, and SoftWave Therapy — an advanced regenerative treatment that uses acoustic waves to promote tissue healing. Patients commonly seek care for chronic pain, spinal correction, and overall wellness optimization.

Restore Family Chiropractic asks the fundamental question: Is your body limiting you from doing what matters most? For residents of Columbus, Westerville, Dublin, and the greater Franklin County area seeking a chiropractor who combines personal experience with professional expertise, Restore Family Chiropractic offers corrective care designed to get your life back.

100% Chiropractic Canton, led by Dr. Teresa Grace Fourre, DC, CNMT, provides corrective chiropractic care in Canton, Georgia. Located at 9266 Knox Bridge Highway, the practice serves families in Cherokee County and the north metro Atlanta area.

Dr. Fourre is a 1997 graduate of Life University and a Certified Neuro Muscular Therapist, bringing nearly three decades of experience to her practice. She is joined by Dr. Jim Ribley, DC, giving patients access to two experienced practitioners under one roof.

Dr. Fourre's certification in Neuro Muscular Therapy sets her practice apart — this specialization focuses on the relationship between the nervous system and the muscular system, allowing her to address pain and dysfunction at a deeper level than standard adjustments alone. This is particularly beneficial for patients with complex chronic pain conditions.

For families in Canton, Woodstock, Ball Ground, and the surrounding Cherokee County area seeking experienced chiropractic care with a neuro muscular therapy specialty, 100% Chiropractic Canton offers decades of expertise in a community-focused setting.

address: 5833 Scottsville Road, Suite 202, Bowling Green, KY
article:
100% Chiropractic Bowling Green, led by Dr. Christopher Stewart, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Bowling Green, Kentucky. Located at 5833 Scottsville Road, Suite 202, the practice serves families throughout Warren County and south-central Kentucky.

Dr. Stewart follows the 100% Chiropractic philosophy of corrective care — working to identify and address the structural causes of pain rather than simply managing symptoms. His practice offers thorough initial evaluations including posture analysis and spinal assessment, followed by personalized care plans designed for long-term correction.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. The practice treats a wide range of conditions including back pain, neck pain, headaches, and general wellness concerns.

Bowling Green is home to Western Kentucky University and a growing community of young families and professionals. 100% Chiropractic Bowling Green provides accessible corrective chiropractic care for the area's diverse population, from college athletes to working families.

True Potential Chiropractic in Beaverton, Oregon, led by Dr. Bryen A. Bell, DC, is one of the Pacific Northwest's leading referral-based healthcare facilities and a 'Best of Beaverton' award winner. Located at 8283 SW Cirrus Drive, the practice has served the greater Portland metro area since 2013.

What makes True Potential Chiropractic stand out is its integrated approach. The award-winning team of Board Certified Chiropractic Physicians, therapists, and specialists provides collaborative care that goes far beyond basic adjustments. Services include comprehensive corrective care for the spine and nervous system, specialized treatment for auto accidents, sports injuries, and gentle pediatric care.

The practice features advanced on-site diagnostics using digital radiology and state-of-the-art INSiGHT scans to identify underlying health issues. The office is designed for families, featuring a signature JEEP pediatric table, a kid-friendly atmosphere, and a patient education lecture hall. Active Release Therapy (ART), bodywork, and stretch therapy round out the integrated wellness offerings.

Dr. Bell married his college sweetheart in 2002 and is a proud father of five, bringing a genuine family perspective to his practice. For residents of Beaverton, Portland, Tigard, and the greater Portland metro area seeking award-winning, comprehensive chiropractic care, True Potential Chiropractic offers an integrated wellness experience backed by advanced diagnostics and a collaborative care team.

100% Chiropractic North Cumming, led by Dr. Jessica Tew, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Cumming, Georgia. Located at 2633 Freedom Parkway, the practice serves families throughout Forsyth County and the north metro Atlanta area.

Dr. Tew's journey to chiropractic is deeply personal. She suffered with Spinal Muscular Atrophy for over 10 years before discovering the benefits of chiropractic care. This personal experience gives her a unique empathy for patients dealing with chronic conditions and a genuine understanding of how proper spinal care can transform quality of life.

As the lead doctor and clinic director, Dr. Tew oversees a practice focused on corrective care — identifying and addressing spinal misalignments that interfere with nervous system function. The 100% Chiropractic approach emphasizes education, helping patients understand the connection between spinal health and overall wellness.

Forsyth County is one of Georgia's fastest-growing areas, and 100% Chiropractic North Cumming provides accessible corrective care for the influx of families establishing roots in the community. For residents of Cumming, Alpharetta, Dawsonville, and the surrounding north Georgia area, the practice offers corrective chiropractic care from a doctor who truly understands what patients go through.

100% Chiropractic Austin Rosedale, located at 3800 N Lamar Boulevard in central Austin, Texas, features Dr. Nicolas Kellerman, DC — a dedicated chiropractor with over 20 years of experience. Dr. Kellerman graduated from Logan University in Chesterfield, Missouri in 2004 and established his first practice in 2005.

What distinguishes Dr. Kellerman is his specialization in sports chiropractic and family care, with advanced qualifications in Active Release Therapy (ART) and acupuncture. ART is a patented soft tissue treatment system that treats problems with muscles, tendons, ligaments, fascia, and nerves — making it particularly effective for athletes and active individuals dealing with overuse injuries, repetitive strain, and sports-related conditions.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm. The central Austin location on North Lamar makes it easily accessible from downtown Austin, Hyde Park, Rosedale, and the surrounding neighborhoods.

For Austin residents seeking a chiropractor who combines two decades of experience with specialized sports medicine techniques, 100% Chiropractic Austin Rosedale offers care that goes beyond standard adjustments to include ART and acupuncture for comprehensive musculoskeletal treatment.

100% Chiropractic West Nashville, led by Dr. Bryna Waters Sutter, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care on Nashville's west side. Located at 4110 Charlotte Avenue, the practice serves families in West Nashville, Sylvan Park, The Nations, and the greater Nashville area.

Dr. Waters Sutter follows the 100% Chiropractic model of corrective care, focusing on identifying and correcting the spinal misalignments that contribute to pain, reduced mobility, and compromised health. Her approach combines thorough evaluation with personalized care plans designed for lasting correction — not just temporary relief.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm. The Charlotte Avenue location puts the practice in the heart of one of Nashville's most vibrant and growing neighborhoods.

For residents of West Nashville, Sylvan Park, Belle Meade, and the surrounding communities seeking chiropractic care that addresses root causes rather than just symptoms, 100% Chiropractic West Nashville offers corrective care in a convenient, accessible location.

address: 657 E Golf Road, Suite 301, Arlington Heights, IL
article:
Bright Futures Chiropractic in Arlington Heights, Illinois is led by Dr. Angie Recendez, DC, alongside Dr. Natalia Tabaszewski, DC. Located at 657 E Golf Road, Suite 301, the practice was founded with a clear mission: inspiring and nurturing families to raise a healthier generation with chiropractic.

Dr. Recendez is a Palmer College of Chiropractic graduate with over 250 additional hours of post-graduate training through the International Chiropractic Pediatric Association (ICPA). She is Webster Certified, a specialized technique for pregnant women that focuses on pelvic balance and optimal fetal positioning. This makes Bright Futures one of the go-to practices in the Chicago suburbs for prenatal and pediatric chiropractic care.

The practice takes a unique team approach — every patient benefits from the combined expertise of multiple doctors. The office is designed as a family-friendly environment where new, experienced, and soon-to-be parents can find both quality care and a community of families with similar health goals. Care is offered Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 9:30am to 12pm and 3pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 3pm to 6pm, and Friday from 9:30am to 1pm.

For families in Arlington Heights, Mount Prospect, Schaumburg, and the northwest Chicago suburbs seeking specialized pediatric and prenatal chiropractic care from Webster-certified doctors, Bright Futures Chiropractic offers gentle, evidence-based care in a warm, family-centered environment.

address: 2301 E Prien Lake Road, Lake Charles, LA
article:
100% Chiropractic Lake Charles, led by Dr. James Williams, DC, MVCOI, provides corrective chiropractic care in Lake Charles, Louisiana. Located at 2301 E Prien Lake Road, the practice serves families throughout Calcasieu Parish and southwest Louisiana.

Dr. Williams holds an MVCOI certification (Motor Vehicle Crash Occupant Injury), making him specially qualified to evaluate and treat injuries resulting from auto accidents. This additional credential, combined with his corrective care expertise, positions his practice as a comprehensive option for both injury recovery and ongoing wellness care.

The office hours reflect a flexible schedule designed for working patients: Monday from 8am to 11am, Tuesday and Thursday from 1pm to 7pm, Wednesday from 8am to 11am and 1pm to 5:30pm, and Friday from 9am to 12pm. The evening hours on Tuesday and Thursday make care accessible for patients who can't visit during traditional business hours.

For residents of Lake Charles, Sulphur, Westlake, and the surrounding southwest Louisiana area seeking chiropractic care that covers both corrective wellness and personal injury treatment, 100% Chiropractic Lake Charles offers specialized expertise in a flexible, patient-friendly schedule.

Healix Chiropractic in Parker, Colorado, formerly known as 100% Chiropractic Parker, is led by Dr. Tara Breske, DC. Co-owned with Alex Breske, the practice is located at 10161 S Parker Road and serves families in Parker, Lone Tree, Castle Rock, and the south Denver metro area.

The rebranding from 100% Chiropractic to Healix reflects the practice's evolution into a comprehensive wellness center. Dr. Breske offers spinal adjustments, wellness care, and massage therapy, providing patients with multiple modalities under one roof to address their health needs.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. The practice welcomes patients seeking both corrective care for specific conditions and ongoing wellness maintenance.

For residents of Parker, Lone Tree, Castle Rock, and the surrounding Douglas County communities looking for chiropractic care that combines adjustments with massage and wellness services, Healix Chiropractic offers an integrated approach to health in a convenient south Denver metro location.

Freedom Chiropractic in Knoxville, Tennessee is led by Dr. Sara Nelson, DC, who founded the practice with a mission to help patients facilitate healing in their bodies through nervous system centered chiropractic care. Located at 7827 Montvue Center Way, the practice specializes in care for families, children, and expectant mothers.

The Freedom Experience begins with a welcoming environment designed for families — complete with a nursing room, changing room, kids' play area, and coffee bar. New patients receive a thorough consultation and assessment that evaluates the location and severity of nerve interference using three non-invasive diagnostic scans with certified NASA technology. X-rays may be taken when necessary, right in the office.

Dr. Nelson's approach focuses on the nervous system as the master controller of health. Rather than simply treating symptoms, Freedom Chiropractic works to identify and correct the nerve interference that may be contributing to a wide range of health challenges. The practice is particularly well-suited for pediatric care, prenatal care, and families seeking a natural approach to health.

The office is open Monday and Thursday from 10:30am to 1:30pm and 3:30pm to 6:30pm, Tuesday from 3:30pm to 6:30pm, and Wednesday from 9am to 12pm and 2pm to 5pm. For families in Knoxville, Farragut, Maryville, and the surrounding east Tennessee area seeking nervous system centered chiropractic care in a family-friendly environment, Freedom Chiropractic offers a comprehensive and welcoming experience.

address: 2321 East Beltline Avenue NE, Suite D, Grand Rapids, MI
article:
100% Chiropractic Grand Rapids is led by the husband-and-wife team of Dr. Angel Santos, DC, and Dr. Erika Santos, DC. Located at 2321 East Beltline Avenue NE, Suite D, the practice provides corrective chiropractic care for families in Grand Rapids and the greater Kent County area of west Michigan.

Having two doctors in the practice means patients benefit from collaborative care and scheduling flexibility. Drs. Angel and Erika Santos follow the 100% Chiropractic corrective care model, focusing on spinal alignment and nervous system function to support long-term health rather than just temporary symptom relief.

The practice welcomes patients of all ages, from children to seniors, and addresses a range of conditions including back pain, neck pain, headaches, and general wellness. The Grand Rapids location on East Beltline makes it accessible from throughout the metro area.

For families in Grand Rapids, East Grand Rapids, Kentwood, and the surrounding west Michigan communities seeking corrective chiropractic care from a dedicated husband-and-wife team, 100% Chiropractic Grand Rapids offers personalized family wellness in a collaborative practice setting.

address: 4411 NW 8th Avenue, Suite C, Gainesville, FL
article:
100% Chiropractic Gainesville, led by Dr. Kris Barnhill, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Gainesville, Florida. Located at 4411 NW 8th Avenue, Suite C, the practice serves the university community, local families, and residents throughout Alachua County.

Dr. Barnhill follows the 100% Chiropractic corrective care philosophy, working to identify and correct spinal misalignments that affect nervous system function and overall health. The approach emphasizes patient education and long-term wellness rather than short-term symptom management.

Gainesville is home to the University of Florida, giving the community a diverse population of students, faculty, young families, and retirees. 100% Chiropractic Gainesville serves this diverse patient base with care plans tailored to each individual's needs and lifestyle.

For residents of Gainesville, Newberry, Alachua, and the surrounding north-central Florida area seeking corrective chiropractic care focused on spinal health and nervous system function, 100% Chiropractic Gainesville offers accessible, education-focused chiropractic wellness.

address: 506 Mercantile Place, Suite 105, Fort Mill, SC
article:
Vibrant Family Chiropractic in Fort Mill, South Carolina is led by Dr. Jerren Stines, DC. Located at 506 Mercantile Place, Suite 105, the practice serves families in Fort Mill, Tega Cay, Indian Land, and the greater Charlotte metro area just across the state line.

Dr. Stines was born and raised in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, and is a graduate of Palmer College of Chiropractic — widely regarded as the founding institution of chiropractic education. He specializes in structural spinal correction following MaxLiving principles, which focus on correcting the five essentials of health: core chiropractic, nutrition, mindset, oxygen and exercise, and minimizing toxins.

Beyond his chiropractic credentials, Dr. Stines is a CrossFit Level 1 Trainer, bringing a fitness-oriented perspective to patient care. This makes his practice particularly well-suited for active individuals and athletes seeking both corrective care and performance optimization. The practice also provides pediatric and family chiropractic care.

For families in Fort Mill, Tega Cay, Indian Land, and the south Charlotte area seeking structural spinal correction from a Palmer-trained doctor with MaxLiving expertise and a fitness background, Vibrant Family Chiropractic offers comprehensive care for active families.

address: 1500 Peachtree Industrial Boulevard, Suite 290, Suwanee, GA
article:
Clear Path Family Chiropractic in Suwanee, Georgia is led by Dr. Adam Tedder, DC, a Sherman College of Chiropractic graduate. Located at 1500 Peachtree Industrial Boulevard, Suite 290, the practice specializes in upper cervical care, pediatrics, and perinatal chiropractic for families throughout Gwinnett County and the northeast Atlanta metro.

Dr. Tedder's focus on upper cervical care sets his practice apart. Upper cervical chiropractic is a specialized discipline that focuses on the precise alignment of the top two vertebrae in the spine — the atlas and axis. Misalignment in this critical area can affect nervous system function throughout the entire body, contributing to a wide range of health issues beyond neck and back pain.

The practice places special emphasis on pediatric and perinatal care, welcoming newborns, children, teenagers, pregnant mothers, and adults. Patients have praised Dr. Tedder for being knowledgeable, thoughtful, and life-changing — with testimonials describing improved mobility and overall well-being after care.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 10am to 1pm and 3pm to 6pm. For families in Suwanee, Duluth, Johns Creek, and the surrounding Gwinnett County area seeking specialized upper cervical care, pediatric chiropractic, or perinatal support, Clear Path Family Chiropractic offers focused, family-centered care.

address: 1084 N. Ballas Road, Des Peres, MO
article:
100% Chiropractic Des Peres, led by Dr. Ted Valley, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Des Peres, Missouri, serving the west St. Louis County community. Located at 1084 N. Ballas Road, the practice is easily accessible from Creve Coeur, Kirkwood, Town and Country, and the greater west county area.

What sets Dr. Valley's practice apart is the use of advanced diagnostic technology, including the Fit3D Scanner for comprehensive posture analysis. This 3D body scanning technology provides objective, measurable data about a patient's posture, body composition, and alignment — allowing Dr. Valley to create precisely targeted corrective care plans and track measurable progress over time.

The practice follows the 100% Chiropractic corrective care model, focusing on identifying and correcting spinal misalignments to restore proper nervous system function. The combination of advanced posture analysis technology with corrective chiropractic techniques provides a data-driven approach to spinal health.

For residents of Des Peres, Creve Coeur, Kirkwood, and the west St. Louis County area seeking chiropractic care backed by advanced posture analysis and 3D body scanning technology, 100% Chiropractic Des Peres offers a modern, evidence-based approach to corrective spinal care.

address: 903 Calle Amanecer, Suite 310, San Clemente, CA
article:
Pacific Pointe Chiropractic in San Clemente, California is led by Dr. Ghazal Eslamy, DC. Located at 903 Calle Amanecer, Suite 310, the practice provides chiropractic care focused on musculoskeletal conditions, spinal health, and non-invasive pain relief for the south Orange County coastal community.

Dr. Eslamy specializes in treating musculoskeletal conditions — the broad category of disorders affecting muscles, bones, joints, tendons, and ligaments. Her non-invasive approach to pain relief makes the practice a strong option for patients seeking alternatives to medication or surgery for chronic pain conditions.

The office offers generous hours including Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 9am to 7pm, Tuesday from 10am to 4pm, and Saturday from 10:30am to 1pm. The Saturday availability and extended weekday hours make care accessible for working professionals and busy families along the south Orange County coast.

For residents of San Clemente, Dana Point, San Juan Capistrano, and the surrounding south Orange County area seeking non-invasive chiropractic care for musculoskeletal conditions, Pacific Pointe Chiropractic offers flexible scheduling and a focus on drug-free pain relief.

100% Chiropractic Tallahassee, led by Dr. William Bevis, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Tallahassee, Florida. Located at 1378 Timberlane Road, the practice serves families in the Tallahassee area, including the Florida State University and Florida A&M University communities.

Dr. Bevis follows the 100% Chiropractic corrective care model, focusing on spinal alignment and nervous system function to support the body's natural healing capabilities. The practice offers comprehensive evaluations for new patients, followed by personalized care plans designed for long-term correction.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm. The Timberlane Road location provides convenient access for patients throughout the Tallahassee metro area.

As Florida's capital city and home to two major universities, Tallahassee has a dynamic population of students, state employees, and families. 100% Chiropractic Tallahassee provides accessible corrective chiropractic care for this diverse community.

Elite Chiropractic in Plano, Texas is led by Dr. Jaclyn Becker, DC. Located at 340 Coit Road, Suite 500b, the practice provides chiropractic and corrective care for patients in Plano, Richardson, Allen, and the greater north Dallas area.

Dr. Becker's path to chiropractic began in childhood when a car accident introduced her to chiropractic care. As a multi-sport athlete — including four years of women's basketball at Oklahoma Panhandle State University — she relied on chiropractic to speed recovery from injuries and address spinal imbalances. She later earned her paramedic license and worked as a paramedic and firefighter for three years before discovering her passion for holistic, preventive health.

This background in emergency medicine combined with her athletic experience gives Dr. Becker a unique perspective. She understands both acute trauma and the long-term musculoskeletal demands of an active lifestyle. After graduating from Parker University in Dallas, she established Elite Chiropractic to help patients find holistic alternatives to medication, injections, and surgery.

For residents of Plano, Richardson, Allen, and the north Dallas area seeking chiropractic care from a doctor who combines emergency medicine experience with a holistic, corrective approach, Elite Chiropractic offers care grounded in real-world clinical and athletic experience.

address: 8055 W Bowles Avenue, Suite 1000, Littleton, CO
article:
100% Chiropractic Littleton, led by Dr. Darby Thomas, DC, provides corrective chiropractic care in Littleton, Colorado. Located at 8055 W Bowles Avenue, Suite 1000, the practice serves families throughout the southwest Denver metro area including Littleton, Ken Caryl, Columbine, and Lakewood.

Dr. Thomas follows the 100% Chiropractic corrective care philosophy, working to identify and address the spinal misalignments that interfere with nervous system function and overall health. Her approach emphasizes long-term correction over temporary symptom relief.

The office is open Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, and Tuesday from 1pm to 5:30pm. The W Bowles Avenue location provides easy access for patients throughout the southwest Denver metro area.

For families in Littleton, Lakewood, Ken Caryl, and the surrounding southwest Denver communities seeking corrective chiropractic care focused on lasting health improvement, 100% Chiropractic Littleton offers personalized care in a family-friendly environment.

doctorName: Dr. Eileen Whelan & Dr. Terry Whelan
article:
Orange Chiropractic & Family Fitness in Orange, Virginia has been serving the community for over 32 years under the care of Dr. Eileen Whelan, DC, and Dr. Terry Whelan, DC. Located at 325 N Madison Road, the practice is a cornerstone of health and wellness in Orange County, Virginia.

What makes this practice unique is the combination of chiropractic care with family fitness services. Beyond traditional spinal adjustments, the practice offers SoftWave Therapy — an advanced regenerative treatment that uses unfocused shockwave technology to promote tissue healing, reduce inflammation, and accelerate recovery. This makes it an option for patients seeking cutting-edge treatment for chronic pain, joint problems, and soft tissue injuries.

The Whelan family's deep roots in the Orange community — with daughter McKenzie also involved in the practice — reflect a genuine commitment to multi-generational health. The practice treats patients of all ages, from children to seniors.

For residents of Orange, Gordonsville, Culpeper, and the surrounding central Virginia area seeking established chiropractic care combined with SoftWave Therapy and family fitness services, Orange Chiropractic & Family Fitness offers over three decades of experience and community trust.

address: 350 W John Sims Pkwy, Unit 401, Niceville, FL 32578
article:
Russell Chiropractic in Niceville, Florida is led by Dr. Kathryn Russell, DC. Located at 350 W John Sims Parkway, Unit 401, the practice provides wellness care, chronic injury treatment, and holistic health services for families in Niceville, Destin, Fort Walton Beach, and the greater Emerald Coast area.

Dr. Russell was born and raised in Fort Walton Beach, Florida, giving her deep roots in the Emerald Coast community she serves. She earned her Exercise Physiology degree from the University of North Florida before completing her Doctor of Chiropractic degree at Keiser University in West Palm Beach. This combination of exercise science and chiropractic training informs her holistic approach to patient care.

The practice takes a wellness-oriented approach, going beyond pain relief to address overall health and vitality. Dr. Russell is particularly experienced with chronic injury treatment — helping patients who have been dealing with long-standing conditions find lasting improvement through chiropractic care.

The office is open Monday through Wednesday from 8am to 11:30am and 3pm to 6pm, and Thursday from 3pm to 6pm. For residents of Niceville, Destin, Fort Walton Beach, Crestview, and the greater Okaloosa County area seeking a holistic chiropractor with local roots and exercise physiology expertise, Russell Chiropractic offers personalized wellness care on the Emerald Coast.

New Hope Chiropractic in Shawnee, Kansas is led by Dr. Dana Huebner, DC, a Certified Pediatric Chiropractor. Located at 16314 W 65th Street, the practice specializes in neurologically-focused pediatric chiropractic care, serving families throughout the western Kansas City metro area.

Dr. Huebner graduated from Cleveland Chiropractic College in 2018 and opened New Hope Chiropractic with a clear mission: helping kids live happier, healthier lives and helping parents attain the stress-free, pain-free lifestyle they deserve. His practice philosophy is rooted in vitalism, holism, and naturalism — the principles that the body is interconnected and has an innate ability to heal when the nervous system is functioning properly.

The practice's focus on pediatric chiropractic makes it a destination for families dealing with childhood health challenges. Dr. Huebner has pursued extensive post-graduate education in pediatric care, giving him the tools to match specific treatment approaches to each child's unique needs. The practice also provides prenatal chiropractic care for expectant mothers and family wellness care for adults.

For families in Shawnee, Overland Park, Lenexa, and the western Kansas City metro seeking a dedicated pediatric chiropractor who takes a neurologically-focused approach to children's health, New Hope Chiropractic offers specialized care built on the philosophy that the power that made the body heals the body.

Preserve Chiropractic and Wellness in Odessa, Florida is led by Dr. Ron Martin, DC. Located at 15989 Preserve Marketplace Boulevard, the practice also operates under the 100% Chiropractic Odessa brand, serving families in Odessa, Trinity, Land O' Lakes, and the greater Pasco County area northwest of Tampa.

Dr. Martin is known for his root-cause approach to health — looking beyond symptoms to identify and address the underlying factors affecting a patient's well-being. The practice treats patients of all ages, including newborns, making it a true family chiropractic center. Services include chiropractic adjustments, stretch therapy, and Stem Wave therapy — an advanced regenerative treatment that uses acoustic waves to stimulate healing.

Patients consistently praise the practice for its caring, thorough approach. Reviews highlight Dr. Martin and his team's commitment to understanding the root causes of health concerns and going above and beyond to help patients heal naturally. The office environment is described as clean, peaceful, and professional.

The office follows standard 100% Chiropractic hours: Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8am to 12pm and 2pm to 6pm, Tuesday from 2pm to 6pm, and Friday from 8am to 12pm. For families in Odessa, Trinity, Land O' Lakes, and the greater northwest Tampa area seeking chiropractic care that combines root-cause analysis with advanced therapies like Stem Wave, Preserve Chiropractic and Wellness offers comprehensive, family-centered care.
